title: Sixth assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§467. Sixth assistant district attorney

           The office of sixth assistant district attorney is hereby created for the Twenty-First Judicial District.

           Added by Acts 1978, No. 465, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1979.
doc_text:
§467.  Sixth assistant district attorney
The office of sixth assistant district attorney is hereby created for the
Twenty-First Judicial District.
Added by Acts 1978, No. 465, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1979.
